tools.name: get_quote
tools.description: Generate a Travel Medical Insurance quote.

tools.name: get_trip_quote
tools.description: Generate a Trip Insurance quote to protect a trip investment.

tools.name: get_countries
tools.description:
Get list of all available countries for travel insurance.
Returns country codes (ISO3), names, and ISO2 codes.

tools.name: get_states
tools.description: Get list of states/provinces for a specific country.

tools.name: get_current_datetime
tools.description: Get the current date and time in US Eastern Time (EST/EDT).
